nasb.text: But your offspring that have been born after them shall be yours; they shall be called by the names of their brothers in their inheritance.

esv.text: And the children that you fathered after them shall be yours. They shall be called by the name of their brothers in their inheritance.

cnv.text: 你在他們以後所生的子孫，都是你的；不過，在繼承產業的事上，他們可以歸在他們哥哥的名下。

ccb.text: 除了他们以外，你其他子女仍然归你，这些子女可以在他们弟兄的名下继承产业。

csbs.text: 而你在他们以后所生的孩子就是你的，在他们继业的事上，被算在这两个哥哥的名下。
